jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Resonance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Resonance. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Resonance:
Resonance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance!
